relations.rationale: The first run is a descendant of the governed delivery gates.

metadata.evidence_note: This revision is the current three-plane behavior inventory. Prior Jira-shaped synthetic receipts are retained only as stale predecessor identities; current model, TestMesh, PPA, runtime, private-first-run, Skill Pack, and ResearchGuard evidence remains required.

ledger.project_boundary: Matters product runtime, model-agnostic Codex and research operations, governed interactive and Codex-hosted daily maintenance through the same bounded private first-run path, Skill Pack lifecycle, installation, and optional clean release
ledger.rationale: One plane-partitioned ledger prevents product owners, AI operations, ResearchGuard, Skill Pack maintenance, provider adapters, UI surfaces, and development gates from becoming parallel authorities.
